final:
module top_module(
	input wire clk,
	input wire reset,
	input wire enable,
	input wire [31:0]d,
	output reg [31:0]q
);always@(posedge clk or posedge reset ) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

	if (reset) begin 
		q<=32'd0;
	end else begin 
		if(enable) begin 
			q<=d;
		end 		
	end
end
endmodule
